title: WhatsApp trigger response mismatch during activation
symptom: When activating the WhatsApp workflow, n8n throws an error stating 'response does not match challenge'. This prevents the workflow from being activated.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or integration
root_cause: The error occurs because the nginx configuration is dropping the query string from the incoming request. This results in n8n responding with a generic message instead of the expected challenge value, causing the verification to fail.
fix_steps: Check the nginx configuration for the webhook route
Ensure that the query string is not being dropped
Test the webhook again to verify the challenge response
agent_instruction: Inspect and correct the nginx configuration to preserve the query string for the WhatsApp webhook.
